title: scrophularia nodosa var. lanceolata
intro: Scrophularia nodosa var. lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved figwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Scrophularia nodosa var. lanceolata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
